side_effects.description: Vertical fine lines appeared on right side of forehead after 10 days of use; skin became more fragile; one line appeared on left side after switching sleep position; lines fading after discontinuation

protocol_notes: ANAiRUi brand GHK-Cu serum. User had excellent baseline skin condition (frequently mistaken for 30-35yo at age 45). Used twice daily for 10 days before stopping due to adverse reaction. Suspected cause: overuse/oversaturation leading to excess copper triggering metalloproteinase production and collagen degradation. Lines fading by end of day after discontinuation and sleep position change.
